description_long: This object is a retro-style video game controller, reminiscent of classic Super Nintendo controllers. It features a rounded rectangular body with a light gray plastic casing and a set of four colored circular buttons (yellow, blue, green, and red) on the right side. On the left side, there is a black cross-shaped directional pad (D-pad), and in the center, two small rectangular buttons are visible. A short black cable with a USB connector protrudes from the top edge, indicating it is designed for wired connectivity. The surface is smooth and slightly contoured for ergonomic grip, with all controls raised for tactile feedback. The overall design is compact and lightweight, suitable for handheld use in gaming scenarios.
description: A compact, retro-style video game controller with a gray body, colored buttons, a D-pad, and a USB cable for wired connection.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full button layout, including the colored buttons, D-pad, and central buttons.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the colored buttons and the USB cable extending from the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the controller and the USB connector in clear detail.
description_view_3: Angled view focusing on the D-pad and the side profile of the controller.
